core_rule: No runtime component may know packet truth during live Holo execution.

fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.name: ID-channel mutual information
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.claim_falsified: No runtime component receives an identifier from which truth is derivable.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.falsified_if: Any extractable token class maps to truth deterministically or near-deterministically.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.passing_does_not_show: Payload content carries no truth signal.

fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.name: Poisoned-spec byte-invariance
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.claim_falsified: Runtime behavior is a pure function of model-visible payload and model outputs.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.falsified_if: Any prompt, gate result, baton, selector decision, or trace byte differs across truth poisoning, or any sentinel appears in runtime output.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.passing_does_not_show: Absence of future truth channels or fields added later.

fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.name: Artifact provenance hash-chain
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.claim_falsified: The harness never writes into worker artifacts.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.falsified_if: Any hash differs from raw model output, or blind runner reaches artifact-normalization functions.

fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.name: Selector truth-swap sweep
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.claim_falsified: The final selector chooses by closed-form blind criteria only.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.falsified_if: Selection changes when only truth metadata changes, declared criteria recomputation disagrees, or selection correlates with truth agreement.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.passing_does_not_show: Selector criteria are wise or unbiased.

fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.name: Canary skew check
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.claim_falsified: The canary was not chosen to be easy.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.falsified_if: Sample is not exactly reproducible, sampler postdates difficulty artifacts, or sampled first-turn correctness exceeds bank rate beyond tolerance.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.passing_does_not_show: The packet bank is representative of real traffic.

fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.name: Budget parity replay
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.claim_falsified: The blind lane buys no accuracy through extra attempts.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.falsified_if: Blind-lane turns, retry caps, or token ceilings exceed the lane it replaces; retries are unlogged or content-triggered.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.passing_does_not_show: Parity with solo baselines or correctness of the shared budget.

fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.name: Claim-scope lint
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.claim_falsified: No rate claim is derived from the canary.
fable_seven_test_disconfirmation_battery.falsified_if: Any canary-sized ratio, percentage, or confidence bound appears publicly; any blind-lane rate lacks a lane label; canary lacks stopping rule and full-run size.

claim_boundary: Current result is governed-runtime counted evidence until blind-gate replication completes.
